'''Saiga Bre'lya''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Gender/Legends|female]]. She was one of the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] guards covertly stationed aboard ''[[Queen of Empire]]'' to watch over [[Elan]] and [[Vergere]] to oversee their transfer from [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. She was killed by [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire from [[Darda]] and [[Capo (Peace Brigade)|Capo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
